completed_tasks.name: Accept BEAT-05 procedural gap and continue milestone completion
Refresh planning docs for shipped state

remaining_tasks.name: Review working tree and isolate milestone files from unrelated source changes
remaining_tasks.progress: git status reviewed; planning docs updated; handoff created before final staging to avoid accidental inclusion of unrelated src/* changes

remaining_tasks.name: Create final milestone completion commit and annotated v1.9 tag

blockers.description: Working tree contains many unrelated source and untracked changes outside .planning; final milestone commit must stage only milestone planning files.
blockers.workaround: Use explicit git add on milestone-related .planning files only; do not use git add . or git add -A.

blockers.description: Pause-work workflow expects a phase directory, but the paused work is milestone-level archival after all v1.9 phases are already complete.
blockers.workaround: Store human handoff under phase 44 directory and explain that phase work is complete; remaining work is milestone commit/tag cleanup.

human_actions_pending.action: Confirm whether to push the annotated v1.9 tag after it is created
human_actions_pending.context: Pushing affects the remote and should be explicitly authorized at resume time.

decisions.decision: Proceed with milestone completion despite missing formal BEAT-05 VERIFICATION.md
decisions.rationale: Audit gap was accepted as procedural only because BEAT-05 had 5 unit tests, UAT 4/4 passed, and VALIDATION.md existed.

decisions.decision: Rewrite ROADMAP.md and STATE.md into shipped/archive form instead of leaving partial in-progress content
decisions.rationale: v1.9 had already shipped and the live planning docs needed to reflect archived milestone state for the next session.
The complete-milestone workflow requires a fresh requirements file for the next milestone.

decisions.decision: Do not run final milestone commit/tag before creating handoff
decisions.rationale: Context was nearly exhausted and the working tree included unrelated code changes that required careful manual staging.

next_action: Run git status and git diff, then stage only milestone-related .planning files plus the two handoff files; create the milestone completion commit before creating annotated tag v1.9.
context_notes: All phase work is complete; the remaining work is milestone archival hygiene. The critical trap is accidental inclusion of unrelated UI/runtime source edits already present in the working tree. Phase 44 is used only as the anchor directory for the handoff file.
